name: redbusagent
description: Autonomous terminal agent with Client-Server architecture (Daemon + TUI)

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@redbusagent/shared && npm run build --workspace=@redbusagent/daemon && npm run build --workspace=@redbusagent/tui && npm run build --workspace=@redbusagent/cli && npm run build --workspace=@redbusagent/studio && npm run build --workspace=redbus-frontend
scripts.clean: rm -rf packages/*/dist packages/*/*.tsbuildinfo packages/*/node_modules apps/*/dist apps/*/out apps/*/*.tsbuildinfo apps/*/node_modules node_modules
